title: Junior Java Full Stack Developer Resume Template
description: Perfect for entry-level developers or career switchers highlighting projects and foundational Java/Spring/React skills.

sections.title: Professional Summary
sections.defaultValue: Dedicated software engineer specialized in Java enterprise ecosystems and modern frontend frameworks like React. Passionate about building modular REST services, optimizing SQL databases, and implementing test-driven modules.

sections.title: Technical Skills
sections.defaultValue: Java, Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, PostgreSQL, MySQL, React, Zustand, Javascript, HTML5, CSS3, TailwindCSS, Git, JUnit, Docker

sections.title: Featured Projects
sections.defaultValue:
JavaMentor Sandbox Project (Vite + React client accessing microservice API endpoints, cached with IndexedDB)
- Configured automated test runs via local compiler environments
- Built robust responsive dashboard panels using Tailwind CSS

title: Junior Frontend Engineer Resume Template
description: Tailored for frontend developers focusing on UI development, performance, state management, and modern Web design.

sections.title: Professional Summary
sections.defaultValue: Creative Frontend Engineer focused on crafting accessible, high-performance web applications. Expert in component design patterns, responsive layouts, and interactive state managers.
